entity.label: Rekem
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the five Midianite kings whom the Israelites destroyed (Num. 31:8).

nodes.label: Rekem
nodes.description: One of the five Midianite kings whom the Israelites destroyed (Num. 31:8).

verses.text: And they slew the kings of Midian, beside the rest of them that were slain; namely, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, five kings of Midian: Balaam also the son of Beor they slew with the sword.

And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses smote with the princes of Midian, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, which were dukes of Sihon, dwelling in the country.
